betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Fluid Extractor (Extractor)§f:
The Extractor (nuclearcraft:extractor) is a single-block machine that pulls fluids out of solid materials. It is the inverse of the Enricher — converting fluid-containing solids into free fluids.

§6Slot Layout (ExtractorRecipes.java)§f:
The Extractor has 1 item input slot and 1 fluid output slot (with a fluidStack output). The base class is BasicProcessorRecipeHandler with a (1, 0, 0, 1) layout.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:115)§f:
Pattern "PMP / BCB / PSP" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: P = plateAdvanced, M = ingotMagnesium, B = Items.BUCKET, C = chassis, S = servo. Yields 1 Extractor.

§6What It Does (ExtractorRecipes.java)§f:
The Extractor handles fluid extraction from solids:
- §bBasalt → Helium-3§f (trace): trace extraction of He-3 from volcanic basalt
- §bLapis + Water → Lapis Solution§f
- §bRedstone + Water → Redstone Solution§f
- §bSaturated sponges → Water§f
- §bWet sponge → Dry sponge + Water§f
- §bVarious ores → trace fluids§f
- §bPlant matter → sap or oil§f (where applicable)

§6Direct Descendants of Extractor (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 5 items used in the Extractor recipe:
- plateAdvanced (nuclearcraft:part:1)
- ingotMagnesium (nuclearcraft:ingot:7)
- Items.BUCKET (minecraft)
- servo (nuclearcraft:part:7)
- chassis (nuclearcraft:part:10)

§6Role in NC Production§f:
The Extractor is the §bentry point for trace fluids§f. Most other NC machines produce fluids from other fluids, but the Extractor is the only way to get fluids from solid materials without first dissolving them.

§6Helium-3 Extraction§f:
The Extractor's most important use is producing §bHelium-3§f from Basalt. He-3 is a critical isotope for:
- High-tier Fission Reactor coolers (3× cooling rate vs water)
- QMD's particle accelerator beam tuning
- Fusion reactor fuel (D-³He aneutronic fusion)

§6Prerequisites§f:
Requires q30021 (Alloy Furnace) — the basic NC unlock.

§eTip§f: Mine a stack of Basalt (found near lava in the Nether or in basalt deltas biome) and run it through the Extractor to produce trace He-3. The yield is small (~1mB per stack) but accumulates.

§eTip§f: Pair the Extractor with a Melter to create a closed-loop fluid chain: solid → fluid (Extractor) → other fluid (Chemical Reactor) → solid (Crystallizer).

§cWarning§f: Extracting trace fluids from ores is slow. For high-volume He-3 production, use multiple Extractors with speed upgrades in parallel.
